title: Multi Language Item Search
description: use different languages when you search items
body:
use different languages when you search items. you can change settings in .minecraft/config/lang.json
![Defalt Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ca2eda7ee780fb5ffa3dc619b469f6381792041.png)
isOn:Whether the mod is enabled
lang_code:Language code used for search Press F3+T to reload settings You can find code on Language Settings(in the right parenthesis) ![Language code in Language Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c0f5a894610b20112e7f38d1d883072ab70cf25_0.webp) Search in English while using Korean
![Search In English](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf9a7d74c8427274a34b16be9cf14dca215aa71e.png) Search in Japanese while using Korean
![Search in Japanese](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3500d53a963704e1417cd4a9affe762eef7d9357.png)
